nasb.text: May the Lord answer you in the day of trouble! May the name of the God of Jacob set you securely on high!

esv.text: May the Lord  answer you in the day of trouble! May the name of the God of Jacob protect you!

cnv.text: 願耶和華在你遭難的日子應允你， 願雅各的　神的名保護你。

ccb.text: 愿耶和华应允你患难时的呼求。 愿雅各的上帝保护你。

csbs.text: 愿耶和华在你患难的日子里回应你， 愿雅各之神的名把你安置在高处。
